name: Workout
description: Chat-first embedded-agent training log. Tell the Workout agent what you did — "deadlift 3x5 at 120kg, swam 40 minutes" — and it builds a current session draft, asks for required missing details, then commits on Finish session. Uses the real Möbius embedded chat with model picker, plus strength PRs, cardio bests, weekly volume, category stats, and a streak heatmap.
author: mobius-os
